hero.badge: Kuthenjwe abadayisi abangu-{shopCount}+ eNingizimu Afrika yonke
hero.title: Dayisa Ku-Inthanethi e
hero.subtitle: Guqula ibhizinisi lakho le-WhatsApp lezingubo libe ikhathalogi ehloniphekile. Layisha isithombe — i-AI ibhala uhlu. Yabelana ngelinki yakho uthole ama-odela nobukhulu, imibala nobungako.
hero.aiOffer: Ama-listing AMAHLANU e-AI amahhala nyanga zonke — akudingeki ikhadi lokuboleka

howItWorks.title: Dala Isitolo Sakho Ku-Inthanethi Ngezinyathelo Ezintathu
howItWorks.subtitle: Akukho ukuphrogrema, akukho abaklanyi, akukho izinkundla ezibizayo. Imikhiqizo yakho nenombolo ye-WhatsApp kuphela.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Layisha isithombe somkhiqizo bese i-AI ikhiqiza isihloko, incazelo, isigaba nezithegi ze-SEO ngemizuzwana engu-10. Ama-listing amahlanu e-AI amahhala nyanga zonke.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Thola i-URL yakho eyingqayizivele. Yifake emaqenjini e-WhatsApp, isimo, i-Instagram bio, i-TikTok — noma kuphi lapho amakhasimende akho ekhona.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Amakhasimende abhrowuza, akhethe izinketho nobungako, bese ekuthumela i-odela ehlelekile ehlanzekile ku-WhatsApp. Nokulandelela kwe-odela okwakhiwe.

features.title: Konke Okudingayo Ukudayisa Ku-Inthanethi eNingizimu Afrika
features.subtitle: Yakhelwe ngokukhethekile indlela abadayisi baseNingizimu Afrika abasebenza ngayo ngempela.

whatsapp.title: Ama-odela Aqonde ku-WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Amakhasimende akhetha ubukhulu, imibala, nobungako — bese ekuthumela i-odela eyodwa ehlanzekile ku-WhatsApp. Akukho ukudideka.

mobile.title: Isebenza Kunoma Yiliphi Ifoni
mobile.description: Akukho uhlelo lokusebenza okumelwe ululande. Amakhasimende akho acindezela ilinki abhrowuze. Ngisho nasedatheni ephansi — isalayisha ngokushesha.

variants.title: Ubukhulu, Imibala Nezinketho
variants.description: Amakhasimende akhetha ngqo okufunayo — akusekho imilayezo ethi "yibuphi ubukhulu?". Wena ubeka izinketho, bona bakhetha.

tracking.title: Landelela Yonke I-odela
tracking.description: Yonke i-odela ithola inombolo yokulandelela. Buyekeza isimo njengoba uhamba: Ilindile → Iqinisekisiwe → Ithunyelwe → Ihanjisiwe.

analytics.title: Bona Obuka Imikhiqizo Yakho
analytics.description: Yazi ukuthi yimiphi imikhiqizo ethola ukubukwa okuningi, okucindezwayo, nokudala ama-odela e-WhatsApp ngempela.

photos.title: Izithombe Ezilayisha Ngokushesha
photos.description: Layisha izithombe zemikhiqizo yakho — sizenza zilayishe ngokushesha kunoma yiliphi ifoni, ngisho naku-3G.

import.title: Layisha Yonke Imikhiqizo Ngesikhathi Esisodwa
import.description: Unespredshithi enemikhiqizo engu-100+? Yilayishe yonke ngemizuzwana. Sizokwenza konke.

marketplace.title: Tholwa Abathengi Abasha
marketplace.description: Imikhiqizo yakho ivela emakethe ye-TradeFeed — izinkulungwane zabathengi baseSA ababhrowuzayo nsuku zonke. Ukuvezwa kwamahhala.

notifications.title: Ungalahlekelwa Kukudayisa
notifications.description: Thola isaziso ngokushesha uma uthola i-odela, uma isitoko siphansi, noma uma umthengi eshiya isibuyekezo.

reviews.title: Izibuyekezo Zabathengi Nokulinganisa
reviews.description: Vumela amakhasimende ajabule akufakazele. Izibuyekezo zakha ukwethemba futhi zisize abathengi abasha.

verified.title: Ibheji Yomdayisi Oqinisekisiwe
verified.description: Bonisa abathengi ukuthi uyibhizinisi langempela ngebheji eqinisekisiwe. Ukwethemba = ukudayisa okuningi.

revenue.title: Yazi Izinombolo Zakho
revenue.description: Bona imali engenayo nsuku zonke, imikhiqizo edayisa kakhulu, nezimo zokukhula. Yazi ngqo okusebenzayo.

pricing.title: Qala Mahhala. Khulisa Isitolo Sakho Uma Ukulungele.
pricing.subtitle: Azikho izindleko ezifihliwe, azikho izimangaliso. Thuthukisa kuphela uma ibhizinisi lakho likhula.

cta.title: Ukulungele
cta.subtitle: Layisha isithombe, i-AI ikhiqiza uhlu, yabelana ku-WhatsApp. Ama-listing akho amahlanu okuqala e-AI ngamahhala — qala ukudayisa ngemizuzu engaphansi kwemithathu.
cta.footer: Ama-listing amahlanu e-AI amahhala · Akukho ikhadi lokuboleka · Setha ngemizuzu engaphansi kwemithathu · Khansela nganoma yisiphi isikhathi

marketplace.title: Imakethe
marketplace.subtitle: Thola imikhiqizo kubadayisi abaphezulu baseNingizimu Afrika
marketplace.noResultsHint: Zama ukusesha okwehlukile noma ulungise izihluzi zakho.

errors.unexpectedError: Kwenzeke iphutha elingalindelekile. Ithimba lethu lazisiwe.
errors.offlineDesc: Hlola uxhumano lwakho lwe-inthanethi bese uzama futhi. Ikali yakho nokuthandayo kugcinwe — kuzoba lapha uma ubuya.
